mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iep (report_id, diagnosis_id, cycle_id, child_id, draft, finalized_content, status) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{diagnosisId}, #{cycleId}, #{childId}, #{draft}, #{finalizedContent}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, report_id, diagnosis_id, cycle_id, child_id, draft, finalized_content, status FROM iep WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, report_id, diagnosis_id, cycle_id, child_id, draft, finalized_content, status FROM iep WHERE child_id = #{childId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE iep SET finalized_content = #{content}, status = 'FINALIZED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
